channel.title: SoCal North
channel.description: News and posts related to the greater North Los Angeles and adjacent counties.

item.title: Air quality officials step up actions at Boyle Heights warehouse as odor complaints rack up

item.description:

item.title: World Cup Heartbreak Hurts. This Artist Turned That Pain Into New Paintings
item.description:
Legendary artist Jorge R. Gutierrez, aka "Super Macho," known for his folk art-influenced paintings and animations for "The Book of Life," is showing his work this friday at La Luz De Jesus Gallery within Soapplant/Wacko in Los Feliz.

item.title: Santa Ynez Chumash Museum and Cultural Center Announces Next “Second Thursday at the Museum” Lecture Featuring Former University of California Professor, Author and Anthropologist Paul H. Gelles
item.description: SANTA YNEZ, CA – June 30, 2026 — The Santa Ynez Chumash Museum and Cultural Center will host the next installment of its free “Second Thursday at the Museum” lecture series on Thursday, July 9, featuring former University of California professor, author and anthropologist Paul H. Gelles.
item.source:markdown: SANTA YNEZ, CA – June 30, 2026 — The Santa Ynez Chumash Museum and Cultural Center will host the next installment of its free “Second Thursday at the Museum” lecture series on Thursday, July 9, featuring former University of California professor, author and anthropologist Paul H. Gelles.

item.title: From Coast to Coast, Launch Takes a Team
item.description: Need an expert welder, three-dimensional printing, metal castings or scaled rocket models?
